snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala ‚Äě300 ńćuda‚Äú donela je zanimljive prińće o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaŇĺu uzalud da je pas najbolji ńćovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moŇĺe da se meri ni sa ńćim.  U KurŇ°umlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreńáe peŇ°ke put Ň°kole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peŇ°ańćiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiŇ°i do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuńáe. Autobusom stiŇĺe do Ň°kole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeŇ°ańći u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ńćeka keruŇ°a Lara.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuńái cele nońái maskiran
Svetom vlada ńćudna epidemija
ńĆekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piŇ°e LOCK DOWN,
VidiŇ° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ńćini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ńćekamo
Da me grliŇ° hońáu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluŇ°aj malo doktore na vestima
Ň†ta ńáe dalje biti baŇ° me zanima
ńĆekaj, hani, hani, da prońĎu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoŇ° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reńć
Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ńźole ńźogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je Ň°to smo sami,
Ne moŇĺemo vani
Zato dońĎi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaŇ° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
ūüéĶ Antonu
ūüéĶ Marku D.
ūüéĶ ŇĹiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanovińá iz Golubinje kod ŇĹepńća poznat je po tome Ň°to je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistińćku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. MeńĎutim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuńáe, zemljiŇ°ta,  Ň°ume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuńáe i imanja. Danas sadi vońáe, uzgaja ovce, kokoŇ°i. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloŇĺen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte prińću koja vas moŇĺe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen Cvitanovińá from Golubinja near ŇĹepńće is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u MeńĎugorju, sve pred povijesni ńćetvrtfinalni okrŇ°aj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko Mamińá! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s Modrińáem, Ň†ukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopńáe bivŇ°i igrańći, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, Ň°to kaŇĺe za sluńćaj Majana Dabińáa, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek pońćetak? Sve to i puno viŇ°e doznajte u nedjelju od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!

Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiŇ°ljala Ň°ta ńáe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanje‚Äú, kaŇĺe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Ň†tajnfeld.
Danijela Ň†tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Ňĺivi veńá godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuŇĺilaŇ°tvu, a u opŇ°irnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogańĎaj koji se odigrao u maju 2012.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äď Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äď July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äč
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äč
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äč
-----------------

Welcome to the Jam!  NBA champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚ÄĚ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚ÄĚ James by playing the game their own way.
James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚ÄĚ films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚ÄĚ), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚ÄĚ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚ÄĚ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ) and Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ).
Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNight School‚ÄĚ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.
The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚ÄĚ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚ÄĚ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚ÄĚ), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚ÄĚ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚ÄĚ), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äď The Last Jedi‚ÄĚ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚ÄĚ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚ÄĚ Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚ÄĚ).
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚ÄĚ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

Credits not final / subject to change

snippet.title: Emanet 147. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow‚Äč and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

Tu niz brdo 
Tu niz brdo sve krene

Kad ne bi zbog nje rezao vene 
Ň†ta radiŇ° ti 
Ň†ta radiŇ° ti kraj mene 

Od sramote nek' se ńáuti 
Prińća naŇ°a 
Ja sam samo falŇ° na ruci 
BogataŇ°a

TEKST:
Intro:
trebace mi nocas tvoja mala
ajde sad dovedi je do stana
bice tu kod mene sedam dana
pice samo vino i sampanjac

ajde bani, tu su mi drugari e 
kosu zavi, popi malo, stani e
casu nali, na mene navali e
pa uradi, sto nisi smela ranije

Al sad vozi me laganie

Ref:
vozi me laganije x3
pa uradi sto nisi smela ranije

Strofa:
tvoje oci gledaju me sad, bomba 
kazes kako hoce sa mnom sve, da probas
flasa vec je prazna trebace, nam  nova 
da se sada skines ne treba, mi lova

mi lova, mi lova
da se sada skines ne treba, mi lova
mi lova, mi lova
a cak i da neces doci ce, mi nova

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

GLE.TV Production
GLE Instagram https://www.instagram.com/gle.tv/‚Äč
GLE Youtube https://www.youtube.com/results?searc...‚Äč
http://gledaj.rs‚Äč

Instagram- https://www.instagram.com/ruza_rupic/
Mail-ruzicarupic1@gmail.com
Snap-ruzarofficial
fb stranica-https://www.facebook.com/Ruza-Rupic-389656007896432/
#IMPRESIVNO #IMPRESIVNOsaRuzomRupic #BakaPrase

snippet.title: NeŇ°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ńćas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskrŇ°njih jaja na ovaj nańćin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neŇĺne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neŇĺnije su mi draŇĺe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrŇ°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAŇĹ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praŇ°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punńća, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronańái joŇ° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odlińćno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunńĎerom skinite peńćat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u Ň°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaŇ°ińćice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Ňĺelite. NiŇ°ta ne meŇ°ajte, sok ńáe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neŇĺniju boju, rozu jaja drŇĺite krańáe u soku.

Istresite teńćnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrŇ°inu da se osuŇ°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaŇĺite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Ň†to se tińće Ňĺutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandŇĺe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirńáetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moŇĺe bilo koji drugi.
RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

I bez politike molim! Ima toliko tema o kojima mozemo pisati, u prvom planu su recepti iz nasih kuhinjica uz to se mozemo i druziti, caskati uz kaficu.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent‚Äôs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Emanet 149. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 149 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. Svi koji Ňĺele pomońái brańái Sarajlińá donacije  mogu uplatiti putem Western uniona na adresu: Mirsada Sarajlińá, selo Vrhovine, 72250 Vitez, BiH, mobitel:062 726 649 ili na devizni rańćun u UniCredit banka BiH, PJ Vitez IBAN BA39 3389002558012230, SWIFT: UNCRBA22
Brańáa Sarajlińá, Aldin i Sedin nemaju ni struju ni vodu. Kuńáu im je napravila Hayat televizija, odnosno donatori emisije "Ispuni mi Ňĺelju". Ovi maloljetnici dobri su uńćenici a odnedavno su i uknjiŇĺeni na posjed gdje se nalazi kuńáa tako da mogu traŇĺiti dozvolu za elektrińćni prikljuńćak. NajviŇ°e im pomaŇĺe nana Mirsada, inańće penzionerka koja ńćak odlazi u Ň°umu skupljati drva kako bi preŇĺivjeli. Aldin i Sedin nemaju mobitel niti kompjutor. Aldin ide na dnevnicu kada ima posla a kada nema, hrani dvije koze koje su dobile i jarińáe. Ovim djeńćacima kaŇĺu preńće je kupatilo i voda nego struja. snippet.description:

Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi

Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad Tomińá - LoŇ°e je proŇ°ao svako ko nije ńáutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:

Svoj posao je obavljao profesionalno bez izuzetka, ne dozvoljavajuńái ikome da krŇ°i pravila lokala. Tamo gde je on radio ni najpoznatiji Ňĺestoki momci nisu mogli da prave haos. To ga je dovodilo u teŇ°ke, a nekada i po Ňĺivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, veńá samo da li naruŇ°avaju red u objektu. I momci kao Ň°to su Arkan, Zlatko Bagarińá, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se ponaŇ°ali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, ToŇ°a je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava Ň†eŇ°elja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. snippet.title: VEńÜI TURBO MONTIRAN NA SUBIA! DA LI ńÜE UPALITI?
snippet.description:
ūüíįSupport the channel: https://paypal.me/AmerMiralem

ūüíľBusiness e-mail:amermiralem@gmail.comlee-little-dragon@hotmail.com 

ūüíĽDragon Garage FB Fan page:https://www.facebook.com/Dragon-Garage-Testovi-vozila-DIY-Uradi-sam-TuningStyling-1712059542358516/ 

ūüď∑Dragon Garage Instagram:https://www.instagram.com/dragon_garage_

Zadnji dio puzle, tacnije price o 300ks je slozen! Za sada vise nista ne moram raditi, cak ni dizne mjenjati jer su i WRX dovoljno jake za ovaj setup. U rezervi imam i STI i dosta jace od njih, ako se odlucim da ga jos radim. Takodje tu je i pumpa goriva, ali prije toga svega, mora se uraditi motor. Mjenjac je takodje slaba karika, pa cemo vidjeti sta ce dalje biti sa Subiem, jer je trenutno na prodaju. Bacio sam oko na GTR-a, ali ako se to ne ispuni, onda cemo nastaviti raditi na Imprezi.

Like, share & subscribe!

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Scar EAT Mufasa? (The Lion King)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

Last time I talked about the Lion King, we were seeing just how big the body count was for this beloved Disney movie and sayong Scar was the rightful king. WEll, we are leaning into that even HARDER this time! Today, I want to talk about the sibling rivalry to end all sibling rivalries - Scar and Mufasa. Theorists, lions are a very, VERY interesting animal. I think that Scar ATE Mufasa after the stampede. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

Booking Pajak & Tasko:  +38978230212 / Pragma Music Entertainment

Tekst

Pajak:
Koj sum da vidam
Na redot li bev
Sekogash lovec ne nikogas plen
Naporno rabotam Buden do 5 
Ej ja

I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

Tasko:
Papa spremni za borba, vleguvam na bitovi,
Gladni sme kako pitovi, veruvaj ne sme pitomi,
Igrava ja pridobiv, i zemav se sto treba, 
Tamu kade sto sum jas, veruvaj vas ne ve gledam !

A ja sedaaam,
Tamu podolgo vreme, koj probal pak na tronot da sedne se zaebal pred vreme,
Vi se smeam, 
Zasto trcate po mene, dur ja trcam po nov GL Mercedes da vozam denes !

Definicija za hustla, nagrada mi e i kazna,
Ali mnogu brzo rastam, nema kasa da e prazna,
Gledaj im ja vadam masta, sakaa i da me raspnat, 
ama moze kje me zaprat, ako me staat u sandak !

Pajak:
I vekje nisto ne e bitno
A se sto pravime e idno
Se sto pravite e isto
Mama postavav jas psiho psiho

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs new song, ‚ÄúDancing With The Devil‚ÄĚ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.
